attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CSF_PA_CANDIDATES.CANDIDATE_ID, STG_CSF_PA_CANDIDATES.ASSIGNMENT_ID, STG_CSF_PA_CANDIDATES.RESOURCE_ID, STG_CSF_PA_CANDIDATES.RECORD_VERSION_NUMBER, STG_CSF_PA_CANDIDATES.STATUS_CODE, STG_CSF_PA_CANDIDATES.NOMINATED_BY_PERSON_ID, STG_CSF_PA_CANDIDATES.NOMINATION_DATE, STG_CSF_PA_CANDIDATES.NOMINATION_COMMENTS, STG_CSF_PA_CANDIDATES.CANDIDATE_RANKING, STG_CSF_PA_CANDIDATES.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, STG_CSF_PA_CANDIDATES.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CSF_PA_CANDIDATES.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CSF_PA_CANDIDATES.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CSF_PA_CANDIDATES.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CSF_PA_CANDIDATES.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CSF_PA_CANDIDATES.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CSF_PA_CANDIDATES.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CSF_PA_CANDIDATES.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CSF_PA_CANDIDATES.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CSF_PA_CANDIDATES.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CSF_PA_CANDIDATES.ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CSF_PA_CANDIDATES.ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CSF_PA_CANDIDATES.ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CSF_PA_CANDIDATES.ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CSF_PA_CANDIDATES.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CSF_PA_CANDIDATES.CREATION_DATE, STG_CSF_PA_CANDIDATES.CREATED_BY, STG_CSF_PA_CANDIDATES.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CSF_PA_CANDIDATES.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CSF_PA_CANDIDATES.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CSF_PA_CANDIDATES.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CSF_PA_CANDIDATES.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CSF_PA_CANDIDATES.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CSF_PA_CANDIDATES.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_PA_CANDIDATES STG_CSF_PA_CANDIDATES,
 (
select CANDIDATE_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_PA_CANDIDATES
minus
select CANDIDATE_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CSF_PA_CANDIDATES
) ACM
where 
 ACM.CANDIDATE_ID = STG_CSF_PA_CANDIDATES.CANDIDATE_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CSF_PA_CANDIDATES.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CSF_PA_CANDIDATES)
